description: Evidence schema version; version 2 records use 2.0.0.
Exact marker identifying a version 2 verification receipt.
Stable logical evidence identifier.
Digest of scope, event/ref, HEAD, run attempt, subject, and input fingerprint.
Only success may satisfy a required check.
Validated execution scope such as local, pull-request, or push.
Validated event identifier without event payload data.
Validated ref identity; credentials and URLs are forbidden.
Full repository commit identity or the explicit unknown sentinel.
Workflow identity supplied by the provider adapter.
Execution-run identity supplied by the local or CI adapter.
Validated positive attempt number.
Single producer job or local owner identity.
Stable logical check identifier.
Digest-bound repository identity without recording a repository URL or absolute path.
Digest of the canonical executable and argument array.
Content fingerprint covering tracked, index, worktree, and non-ignored untracked inputs.
Digest of the effective verification policies.
Clean, dirty, or unknown; unknown cannot be reused.
Digest of configured toolchain identities and versions.
Digest of the normalized result metadata, never raw output.
Digest binding declared outputs and upstream receipts; none is represented by a stable sentinel.
UTC creation timestamp used for diagnostics, not for identity matching.
Raw command output must not be stored in authoritative evidence.
Environment-variable dumps must not be stored in evidence.
Secrets, tokens, keys, credentials, and secret-like values are forbidden.
Host-specific absolute paths are forbidden.
